actors.actor: The Metropolitan Museum of Art (Open Access)

schedule.name: curiosity-corpus
schedule.note: curiosity · rarity, magic temples, roots, beauty, scripts, tongues, geography, scale, star-lore, machine-legibility

schedule.name: curiosity-market
schedule.note: curiosity · corpus↔market echoes, living vs. archived vocabulary, crown jewels

schedule.name: wbm-feed
schedule.note: WBM · save a batch of catalogue source pages to the Wayback Machine

schedule.name: download-A
schedule.note: images · priority downloads → LOCAL store (drive died 2026-07-12); auto-stops at 5 GB free, resumes when space appears

schedule.name: crawl-crossasia
schedule.note: manuscripts · DLNTM metadata, a few pages at a time

schedule.name: crawl-efeo
schedule.note: manuscripts · EFEO Lanna metadata, a few pages at a time

schedule.name: market-mirror
schedule.note: IA · pull a few more ephemeral listing thumbnails into the CAS

schedule.name: cma
schedule.note: museums · Cleveland Museum of Art open-access SE-Asian sweep

schedule.name: download-B
schedule.note: images · first-folio thumbnails for the 5,203 never-enumerated mss → local store; ~0.3 GB total, guarded at 5 GB free. Always be crawling.

schedule.name: market-refresh-sg
schedule.note: commerce · DAILY: lazada.sg (SG amulet crossover); aborts on punish, refs retryable

schedule.name: market-refresh
schedule.note: commerce · COMPLETION phase: resumable DEEP Lazada crawl (dedup-safe, monotonic real photos, no upload). Skips done (term,page) refs so each nightly run advances coverage toward ALL listings complete; anti-bot wall clamps after a few pages so it fills in over many nights. Once coverage is complete, switch to maintenance: market_daily.py --pages 2 at 1-2x/week.

schedule.name: translate
schedule.note: translate · ~3am nightly: 40 priority prose pages, image-grounded transcribe+translate

schedule.name: scribe
schedule.note: scribe · SUPERSEDED by live node findings (build_article computes findings per node); kept for reference, disabled so it stops re-writing .md blocks

schedule.name: publish-gh
schedule.note: GitHub · publish static site. OFF here — already run by the com.nanobotco.lannawiki.refresh LaunchAgent; enable only if you unload that agent to avoid double-pushing

schedule.name: lazada
schedule.note: commerce · browser crawl; anti-bot walled — enable only when watching

items.title: Thaweesukarn, Carved by Hand with One Eye Closed, Model of the Heavenly King, Supporting the Image of Luang Pho Thongwan, Wat Baan Phak Dom 2565.
กะลาตาเดียวแกะ รุ่น ทรัพย์เศรษฐี พิมพ์รูปไข่ แกะรูป หลวงปู่จื่อ วัดเขาตาเงาะอุดมพร (KN1703263)
พระราหู แกะจากกะลาตาเดียว ครูบาเต่า วัดทุ่งเศรษฐี 2566
The One-Eyed Sheep, Little Monk, at Wat Sricha Thong
ราหู หนุนดวง " รุ่นแรก " (กะลาตาเดียว) หลวงพ่อโชคชัย : วัดน้ำดิบ จ.กำแพงเพชร
กะลาตาเดียว ทนานตักข้าวสาร ตั้งบูชา พร้อมหอยสังข์มงคล กะลาตาเดียวแท้
One-Eyed Turtle Necklace Separated by Micron Gold with the Head of a King Kudu (24 Inches).

findings.title: Where the stars were written down
The shared vocabulary: words that run from leaf to stall
The minority hands: scripts beyond Tham Lanna
Where three tongues share a page
The provinces that kept the most
